report.summary: Community growth cycle v5 (Mar 17): FOMC Decision Day eve — BTC $75,272 (+25% from Feb bottom, +3.12% 24h); drafted 4 tweets + 5-post FOMC thread + Discord/Telegram update + full newsletter for Thu Mar 19; NEW narratives: Solana joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program, Bybit launches AI Skills (253 API endpoints, autonomous trading agents), tokenized gold trading surging; ETF inflows $199M yesterday (6th straight day, $1.3B+ March total); created FOMC Decision Day social card (3-scenario layout with BTC targets); Fear & Greed 15; Fed decides tomorrow 2pm ET; 92%+ hold probability; dot plot is the real trade.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet 1 (Tue evening): BTC $75K milestone — first time in 6 weeks; 6 straight ETF inflow days (+$199M yesterday); oil pulling back; Fear 15; Fed decides tomorrow; dot plot is the real trade; CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide
Tweet 2 (Tue night): Solana x Mastercard — SOL joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program; real institutional adoption signal; CTA to /learn/jupiter-solana-guide
Tweet 3 (Wed morning): Bybit AI Skills launch — 253 API endpoints, zero-setup autonomous trading agents; DeFAI thesis going live in production; CTA to /learn/defai-guide-2026
Tweet 4 (Wed afternoon): Tax season urgency — 27 days to April 15; DeFi, NFTs, staking rewards, airdrops all taxable; CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026

Twitter Thread (5 posts, Wed pre-2pm): FOMC Decision Day — rate decision not the trade (92% hold priced in); 3 scenarios (Dovish: BTC→$80K, Neutral: $68K-$74K, Hawkish: →$65K); first meeting pricing Iran+oil+tariffs; BTC dropped after 7/8 2025 meetings but 48h rebound consistent; Powell term expires May 23, Warsh replacement; CTA to FOMC guide

Discord/Telegram (Tue evening): Full update — BTC $75K+, 6 straight ETF inflow days, Solana+Mastercard, Fear 15; recently published pages (Monad guide, Smart Wallets guide, 5 crypto card reviews); FOMC preview with 3 scenarios

Newsletter (Thu Mar 19): FOMC aftermath lead; 3 subject lines; Market pulse (BTC $75K, ETF $1.3B March, Fear 15, Solana+Mastercard); 4 new pages (Monad, Smart Wallets, Crypto Oracles coming, 5 card reviews); Worth reading (FOMC guide + Tax guide 27 days); Degen Corner (Bybit AI Skills + tokenized gold + DeFAI thesis live)

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: MARKET DATA (live search, Mar 17 evening): BTC $75,272 (+3.12% 24h, +25% from Feb $60K bottom). ETH ~$2,350. SOL +4.34%. BTC hit $75K for first time in 6 weeks. Global crypto mcap ~$2.62T. Fear & Greed 15 (Extreme Fear despite rally).
ETF INFLOWS: $199M net inflow yesterday — 6th consecutive positive day. $1.3B+ cumulative March inflows. First positive month since October. Institutional conviction strengthening.

FOMC PREVIEW: Decision Mar 18 at 2pm ET, Powell presser 2:30pm. 92%+ hold probability at 3.50-3.75%. First meeting pricing Iran conflict + oil shock + 15% tariffs. CPI 2.4% pre-Iran but Core PCE 2.8%. JPMorgan: no cuts 2026. Goldman: maybe 2.

NEW NARRATIVES THIS CYCLE: (1) Solana joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program — real payments infrastructure adoption; (2) Bybit launches AI Skills — 253 API endpoints, zero-setup autonomous trading agents; (3) Tokenized gold trading surging on exchanges as alternative hedge; (4) Aave Shield new DeFi protection mechanism after $50M incident; (5) SEC proposing to narrow Rule 15c2-11 to equity securities only.
HISTORICAL PATTERN: BTC dropped after 7/8 FOMC meetings in 2025. Jan 2026: held as expected → BTC fell 7.3% ($90.4K→$83.4K) in 48h. But 48h rebound window is consistent entry point.
POWELL TRANSITION: Term expires May 23, 2026. Kevin Warsh leading replacement — more hawkish but open to financial innovation/deregulation.

PUBLISHED TODAY (Day 52): 2 pages promoted — /learn/monad-blockchain-guide, /learn/smart-wallets-account-abstraction-guide. Total published ~395. Queue: 2 remaining (hyperliquid ecosystem, crypto oracles guide).
Posting schedule: Tue evening (BTC $75K + Solana Mastercard + Discord) → Wed morning (Bybit AI Skills + FOMC thread pre-2pm) → Wed afternoon (Tax urgency) → Thu (newsletter)
